zh.lifeSummary: 當William John Alford V於1545年出生在英國薩默塞特特斯陶頓時，他的父親Alexander Alford36歲，母親Agnes Clarke34歲。他於大約1573年與Amy Seeley在英國薩默塞特特斯陶頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1578年4月在英國英格蘭薩默塞特特斯陶頓享年33歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特特斯陶頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William John Alford V于1545年出生在英国薩默塞特特斯陶頓时，他的父亲Alexander Alford36岁，母亲Agnes Clarke34岁。他于大约1573年与Amy Seeley在英国薩默塞特特斯陶頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1578年4月在英国英格兰薩默塞特特斯陶頓享年33岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特特斯陶頓。

nameMeanings.name: Alford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Alford, for example in Somerset, Cheshire and Lincolnshire. The first is named with the Old English female personal name Ealdgȳth + ford ‘ford’. See also Alvord .

variants.name: Alvord
meanings: English (southwestern): variant of   Alford   1; the spelling reflects the southwestern English dialect pronunciation.
History: This surname was brought to North America by Alexander Alvord, who came from Devon or Somerset to Windsor, CT, c. 1645. He had many prominent descendants.

variants.name: Halford
meanings: English (mainly Midlands): habitational name from any of various places called Halford. Most, for example those in Warwickshire, Devon, and Shropshire, or the lost place Haleford in Pembury (Kent), are named from Old English halh ‘nook, recess’ + ford ‘ford’.
English: variant of Alford with prosthetic H-.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When William John Alford V was born in 1545, in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England, his father, Alexander Alford, was 36 and his mother, Agnes Clarke, was 34. He married Amy Seeley about 1573, in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in April 1578, in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33, and was buried in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William John Alford V est né en 1545, à Whitestaunton, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Alexander Alford, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Agnes Clarke, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Amy Seeley environ 1573, à Whitestaunton, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en avril 1578, à Whitestaunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterré à Whitestaunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat um 1573 in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England Amy Seeley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb im April 1578 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Amy Seeley circa 1573, nel Whitestaunton, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: William John Alford Vが1545年にイギリスソメルセトウィテスタウントンで生まれた時，父Alexander Alfordは36歳，母Agnes Clarkeは34歳であった。約1573年にイギリスソメルセトウィテスタウントンでAmy Seeleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1578年4月にイギリスイギリスソメルセトウィテスタウントンで33歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトウィテスタウントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William John Alford V(이)가 1545년 영국 서머세트 휘츠타운턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Alford(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Clarke(은)는 34세였다. 그는 대략 1573년 영국 서머세트 휘츠타운턴에서 Amy Seeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1578년 4월 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 휘츠타운턴에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 휘츠타운턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William John Alford V родился в 1545 г. в местности уитстаунтон, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Alexander Alford было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Clarke, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Amy Seeley около 1573 г. в местности уитстаунтон, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер апрель 1578 г. в местности уитстаунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет и был похоронен в местности уитстаунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
